```{r}
distant_mets_dmgs <- c("MARK1", "BSN", "FNDC4", "FAM150B", "HLA-L", "ELOVL5", "EPHB1", "FAM69B", "COL5A1", "TNXB", "LRRC14B", "TMEM87B", "RASA3", "SOCS1", "MAPK4", "ADRA1D", "GALNT9", "SLC38A3", "NAT8L", "PVALB", "C12orf68", "PRDM8", "GPR123", "ZDHHC22", "LHX4", "C3orf50", "BAI3", "C14orf39", "NXN", "SLC1A2", "RASGRP2", "TCHH", "KLF7", "CORO2B", "LINC01152", "CSMD2", "SHC4", "NRN1", "TET1", "ABR", "RGS7", "ZDBF2", "FLJ44817", "BRSK2", "BNC2", "C1orf65", "FAM163A", "LMO2", "ZNF382", "ISM1", "MIXL1", "GRHL3", "KIF1A", "GABRB2", "DTX1", "CHST1", "ECE2", "HTR4", "GRK5", "DPYSL4", "STMN2", "INHBB", "NEUROG1", "S1PR1", "CDYL", "SNCAIP", "SLC30A3", "LOC387763", "SLC30A10", "C3orf55", "MLN", "MCC", "TMOD1", "NTF3", "WNT1", "TACR1", "WNT5A", "AP3B2", "PRMT6", "TFPT", "FGR", "OTX2-AS1", "3-Mar", "4-Mar", "FJX1", "MIR548H4", "BEND6", "ZNF775", "STXBP5L", "NAV2", "SOX14", "PRPH", "LMF1", "NEURL", "ADAMTS19-AS1", "KREMEN2", "GRIN2C", "CR2", "SAMD11", "PITX2", "MACROD1", "STMN3", "MFSD2B", "EPHB6", "CNIH2", "TRPM1", "CACNB4", "ALDH1A3", "NRP2", "WSCD1", "SIX3", "SESN1", "CCDC42B", "PRPF31", "UQCC")

# --- 3. Generate and Save Heatmap ---
message("Generating heatmap...")

# Get all unique overlapping genes
all_dmgs <- unique(c(any_mets_dmgs, ln_mets_dmgs, distant_mets_dmgs))
overlapping_genes <- intersect(degs_list, all_dmgs)

if (length(overlapping_genes) > 0) {
  # This assumes 'dds' is your DESeq2 object from the previous analysis
  vst_counts <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds, blind = FALSE)
  plot_data <- assay(vst_counts)[overlapping_genes, , drop = FALSE]

  # Z-score scale the data by row (gene)
  plot_data <- t(scale(t(plot_data)))

  # Create an annotation data frame for the heatmap columns
  annotation_df <- as.data.frame(colData(dds)[, c("mets", "sex_num")])
  annotation_df$Metastasis <- ifelse(annotation_df$mets == 1, "Mets", "No Mets")
  annotation_df$Sex <- ifelse(annotation_df$sex_num == 1, "M", "F")
  annotation_df$mets <- NULL
  annotation_df$sex_num <- NULL

  # Create the heatmap object
  heatmap_plot <- pheatmap(plot_data,
                           annotation_col = annotation_df,
                           cluster_rows = TRUE,
                           cluster_cols = TRUE,
                           show_colnames = FALSE,
                           main = "Expression of Overlapping Genes (All Cells Pseudobulk)",
                           silent = TRUE)

  # Define output path and save the plot to a PDF
  output_dir_plots <- file.path(analysis_outputs, "Final_Plots")
  dir.create(output_dir_plots, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  heatmap_file <- file.path(output_dir_plots, "Overlap_Heatmap.pdf")
  
  cairo_pdf(heatmap_file, width = 8, height = 6)
  print(heatmap_plot)
  dev.off()
  
  message(paste("...Heatmap saved to:", heatmap_file))
  
} else {
  message("No overlapping genes found between DEGs and DMGs. Skipping heatmap.")
}

```

```{r}
# ---
# SCRIPT: UMAP Feature Plot for Differentially Methylated Genes (DMGs)
# ---

# --- 1. Load Libraries ---
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
})

# --- 2. Load Your Processed Seurat Object ---
# This should be the 'srt' object that has already had Harmony run on it.
# If it's not in your environment, load it:
# srt <- readRDS("path/to/your/harmony_processed_seurat_object.rds")

# --- 3. Create 'cell_class' Metadata Column ---
# This mapping creates the broad cell type categories from your detailed atlas labels.
message("Creating 'cell_class' metadata column...")
label_to_class <- c("cE01 (Stem/TA-like)"="Tumor cells", "cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)"="Tumor cells", "cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)"="Tumor cells", "cE04 (Enterocyte 1)"="Tumor cells", "cE05 (Enterocyte 2)"="Tumor cells", "cE06 (Immature Goblet)"="Tumor cells", "cE07 (Goblet/Enterocyte)"="Tumor cells", "cE08 (Goblet)"="Tumor cells", "cE09 (Best4)"="Tumor cells", "cE10 (Tuft)"="Tumor cells", "cE11 (Enteroendocrine)"="Tumor cells", "cS25 (Fibro CCL8+)"="Fibroblasts", "cS26 (Myofibro)"="Fibroblasts", "cS27 (CXCL14+ CAF)"="Fibroblasts", "cS28 (GREM1+ CAF)"="Fibroblasts", "cS29 (MMP3+ CAF)"="Fibroblasts", "cS30 (CAF CCL8 Fibro-like)"="Fibroblasts", "cS21 (Fibro stem cell niche)"="Fibroblasts", "cS22 (Fibro stem cell niche)"="Fibroblasts", "cS23 (Fibro BMP-producing)"="Fibroblasts", "cS24 (Fibro BMP-producing)"="Fibroblasts", "cS31 (CAF stem niche Fibro-like)"="Fibroblasts", "cTNI10 (CD8+ IL7R+)"="CD8+ T-cells", "cTNI11 (CD8+GZMK+)"="CD8+ T-cells", "cTNI12 (CD8+ IL7R+)"="CD8+ T-cells", "cTNI13 (CD8+ T IL17+)"="CD8+ T-cells", "cTNI14 (CD8+ CXCL13+)"="CD8+ T-cells", "cTNI15 (CD8+ CXCL13+ HSP+)"="CD8+ T-cells", "cTNI16 (CD8+ CXCL13+ prolif)"="CD8+ T-cells", "cM02 (Macrophage-like)"="Macrophages", "cM01 (Monocyte)"="Macrophages", "cTNI01 (CD4+ IL7R+)"="CD4+ T-cells", "cTNI02 (CD4+ IL7R+SELL+)"="CD4+ T-cells","cTNI03 (CD4+ IL7R+HSP+)"="CD4+ T-cells","cTNI04 (CD4+ IL7R+CCL5+)"="CD4+ T-cells","cTNI05 (CD4+ IL17+)"="CD4+ T-cells","cTNI06 (CD4+ TFH)"="TFH cells","cTNI07 (CD4+ CXCL13+)"="CD4+ T-cells","cTNI08 (CD4+ Treg)"="Treg","cTNI09 (CD4+ Treg prolif)"="Treg")

srt$cell_class <- unname(label_to_class[srt$predicted.id])
srt$cell_class[is.na(srt$cell_class)] <- "Other" # Assign 'Other' to any unmapped labels
message("...Done.")

# --- 4. Define Your Full List of Differentially Methylated Genes ---
any_mets_dmgs <- c("CAPN13", "JMJD8", "CA10", "LINC00424", "GALNT14", "ADRA2C", "ANK1", "FER1L6-AS2", "SLIT2", "ABL1", "PAK1", "C10orf11", "CCDC60", "PTPRM", "HLA-DOA", "LOC644145", "H2AFY2", "TFAP2B", "C8orf33", "KCNQ2", "ATP7B", "DSCR3", "SNORA39", "SPTBN4")
ln_mets_dmgs <- c("CENPB", "GPR1-AS", "ZMYM2", "FAM126A", "ABCA7", "LOC100190940", "GOLT1A")
distant_mets_dmgs <- c("MARK1", "BSN", "FNDC4", "FAM150B", "HLA-L", "ELOVL5", "EPHB1", "FAM69B", "COL5A1", "TNXB", "LRRC14B", "TMEM87B", "RASA3", "SOCS1", "MAPK4", "ADRA1D", "GALNT9", "SLC38A3", "NAT8L", "PVALB", "C12orf68", "PRDM8", "GPR123", "ZDHHC22", "LHX4", "C3orf50", "BAI3", "C14orf39", "NXN", "SLC1A2", "RASGRP2", "TCHH", "KLF7", "CORO2B", "LINC01152", "CSMD2", "SHC4", "NRN1", "TET1", "ABR", "RGS7", "ZDBF2", "FLJ44817", "BRSK2", "BNC2", "C1orf65", "FAM163A", "LMO2", "ZNF382", "ISM1", "MIXL1", "GRHL3", "KIF1A", "GABRB2", "DTX1", "CHST1", "ECE2", "HTR4", "GRK5", "DPYSL4", "STMN2", "INHBB", "NEUROG1", "S1PR1", "CDYL", "SNCAIP", "SLC30A3", "LOC387763", "SLC30A10", "C3orf55", "MLN", "MCC", "TMOD1", "NTF3", "WNT1", "TACR1", "WNT5A", "AP3B2", "PRMT6", "TFPT", "FGR", "OTX2-AS1", "3-Mar", "4-Mar", "FJX1", "MIR548H4", "BEND6", "ZNF775", "STXBP5L", "NAV2", "SOX14", "PRPH", "LMF1", "NEURL", "ADAMTS19-AS1", "KREMEN2", "GRIN2C", "CR2", "SAMD11", "PITX2", "MACROD1", "STMN3", "MFSD2B", "EPHB6", "CNIH2", "TRPM1", "CACNB4", "ALDH1A3", "NRP2", "WSCD1", "SIX3", "SESN1", "CCDC42B", "PRPF31", "UQCC")

all_dmgs_list <- unique(c(any_mets_dmgs, ln_mets_dmgs, distant_mets_dmgs))

# --- 5. Calculate the Module Score ---
srt <- AddModuleScore(
  object = srt,
  features = list(all_dmgs_list),
  name = 'DMG_Score'
)

# --- 6. Generate the Feature Plot ---
p_score <- FeaturePlot(
  object = srt,
  features = 'DMG_Score1',
  pt.size = 0.5,
  order = TRUE,
  min.cutoff = 'q10',
  max.cutoff = 'q90'
) +
  ggtitle("Expression of DMG Signature") +
  scale_color_viridis_c()

# For comparison, plot the cell types
p_clusters <- DimPlot(srt, group.by = "cell_class") + ggtitle("Cell Types")

# Display the two plots side-by-side
print(p_clusters + p_score)
```

Venn Diagram
```{r}
###############################################################################
# DH vs TCGA EWAS validation — Venn-only (with 450k harmonization)
# Discovery: DH p < 1e-3 (nominal)
# Replication: TCGA one-sided p < 0.05 in DH-implied direction
# - DH fits (Tier3):
#   /Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/code/results_ewas_any/H6/ewas_fits.rds
#   /Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/code/results_ewas_ln/H6/ewas_fits.rds
#   /Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/code/results_ewas_dist/H6/ewas_fits.rds
# - TCGA fits (Tier3):
#   results_tcga_tier3/{any_mets, ln_only, distant}/fit.rds
# - Output: results_validation_DH_vs_TCGA/venn_only/venn_{dh}_{tcga}.pdf
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma); library(dplyr); library(tibble); library(readr); library(glue)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
})

# Ensure VennDiagram is installed/loaded (for Venn-only output)
if (!requireNamespace("VennDiagram", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("VennDiagram", repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
}
library(VennDiagram); library(grid)

## --- CONFIG ------------------------------------------------------------------
dh_root   <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
tcga_root <- "results_tcga_tier3"
out_dir   <- "results_validation_DH_vs_TCGA"
venn_dir  <- file.path(out_dir, "venn_only")
dir.create(venn_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Corrected mapping
pheno_map <- tibble::tribble(
  ~dh_tag, ~tcga_tag,   ~pretty,
  "any",   "any_mets",  "Any metastasis",
  "ln",    "ln_only",   "LN-only",
  "dist",  "distant",   "Distant"
)

# Thresholds
DH_P_CUT            <- 1e-3   # DH discovery threshold (nominal p)
TCGA_P_ONE_SIDED    <- 0.05   # TCGA replication threshold (one-sided)

## --- Helpers -----------------------------------------------------------------
msg <- \(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "] ", ..., "\n")
`%||%` <- function(a,b) if (is.null(a)) b else a

top_table_robust <- function(fit) {
  cols <- colnames(fit$coefficients)
  coef_to_use <- if ("pheno_bin" %in% cols) "pheno_bin" else tail(cols, 1)
  limma::topTable(fit, coef = coef_to_use, number = Inf, sort.by = "P")
}

load_dh <- function(dh_tag) {
  f <- file.path(dh_root, glue("results_ewas_{dh_tag}"), "H6", "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(f)) stop("Missing DH fit: ", f, call. = FALSE)
  fits <- readRDS(f)
  fit  <- fits$Tier3 %||% fits[[3]]
  tt   <- top_table_robust(fit)
  tibble::rownames_to_column(as.data.frame(tt), "CpG") %>%
    transmute(CpG, logFC_dh = logFC, P_dh = P.Value, adjP_dh = adj.P.Val)
}

load_tcga <- function(tcga_tag) {
  f <- file.path(tcga_root, tcga_tag, "fit.rds")
  if (!file.exists(f)) stop("Missing TCGA fit: ", f, call. = FALSE)
  obj <- readRDS(f)
  fit <- if (inherits(obj, "MArrayLM")) obj else obj$fit
  tt  <- top_table_robust(fit)
  tibble::rownames_to_column(as.data.frame(tt), "CpG") %>%
    transmute(CpG, logFC_tcga = logFC, P_tcga = P.Value, adjP_tcga = adj.P.Val)
}

# Convert TCGA two-sided p to one-sided p in the direction predicted by DH
p_one_sided_in_DH_direction <- function(p_two, sign_tcga, sign_dh) {
  same <- sign_tcga == sign_dh
  p1   <- ifelse(same, p_two/2, 1 - p_two/2)  # conservative one-sided from two-sided
  p1
}

draw_pair_venn <- function(setA, setB, labels, main_title) {
  grid::grid.newpage()
  v <- VennDiagram::draw.pairwise.venn(
    area1       = length(setA),
    area2       = length(setB),
    cross.area  = length(intersect(setA, setB)),
    category    = labels,
    fill        = c("#6baed6", "#fd8d3c"),
    alpha       = c(0.5, 0.5),
    lty         = "blank",
    cat.cex     = 1.2,
    cex         = 1.5,
    main        = main_title
  )
  grid::grid.draw(v)
}

## --- 450k probe universe (platform harmonization) ----------------------------
anno450k  <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
cpgs_450k <- rownames(anno450k)

## --- Generate Venn-only PDFs -------------------------------------------------
for (i in seq_len(nrow(pheno_map))) {
  dh_tag   <- pheno_map$dh_tag[i]
  tcga_tag <- pheno_map$tcga_tag[i]
  pretty   <- pheno_map$pretty[i]

  msg(glue("— {pretty} — loading & harmonizing"))
  dh   <- load_dh(dh_tag)     %>% filter(CpG %in% cpgs_450k)
  tcga <- load_tcga(tcga_tag) %>% filter(CpG %in% cpgs_450k)

  # DH discovery set: nominal p < 1e-3
  dh$sign_dh <- sign(dh$logFC_dh)
  dh_disc_all <- dh %>% filter(P_dh < DH_P_CUT)

  # Compute TCGA one-sided p in DH direction (for CpGs present in both)
  both <- inner_join(
    dh_disc_all %>% dplyr::select(CpG, sign_dh),
    tcga %>% dplyr::select(CpG, logFC_tcga, P_tcga),
    by = "CpG"
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      sign_tcga = sign(logFC_tcga),
      p1_tcga   = p_one_sided_in_DH_direction(P_tcga, sign_tcga, sign_dh)
    )

  # TCGA replication set = CpGs with one-sided p < 0.05 in DH direction
  tcga_rep_all <- both %>% filter(p1_tcga < TCGA_P_ONE_SIDED)

  # Direction-specific subsets (hyper/hypo defined by DH sign)
  dh_hyper <- dh_disc_all %>% filter(sign_dh > 0)
  dh_hypo  <- dh_disc_all %>% filter(sign_dh < 0)

  tcga_rep_hyper <- both %>% filter(sign_dh > 0, p1_tcga < TCGA_P_ONE_SIDED)
  tcga_rep_hypo  <- both %>% filter(sign_dh < 0, p1_tcga < TCGA_P_ONE_SIDED)

  # Prepare sets for Venns
  set_dh_all   <- dh_disc_all$CpG
  set_tcga_all <- tcga_rep_all$CpG

  set_dh_hyper   <- dh_hyper$CpG
  set_tcga_hyper <- tcga_rep_hyper$CpG

  set_dh_hypo   <- dh_hypo$CpG
  set_tcga_hypo <- tcga_rep_hypo$CpG

  # PDF (3 pages): All / Hyper / Hypo
  pdf_file <- file.path(venn_dir, glue("venn_{dh_tag}_{tcga_tag}.pdf"))
  pdf(pdf_file, width = 6.5, height = 5.5)

  # 1) All significant (DH nominal vs TCGA one-sided replication)
  draw_pair_venn(
    set_dh_all, set_tcga_all,
    labels = c("DH (p<1e-3)", "TCGA (one-sided p<0.05)"),
    main_title = glue("{pretty}: All (DH nominal, TCGA one-sided)")
  )

  # 2) Hyper only (DH>0; TCGA same direction one-sided)
  draw_pair_venn(
    set_dh_hyper, set_tcga_hyper,
    labels = c("DH hyper (p<1e-3)", "TCGA hyper (one-sided p<0.05)"),
    main_title = glue("{pretty}: Hyper only (direction-aware)")
  )

  # 3) Hypo only (DH<0; TCGA same direction one-sided)
  draw_pair_venn(
    set_dh_hypo, set_tcga_hypo,
    labels = c("DH hypo (p<1e-3)", "TCGA hypo (one-sided p<0.05)"),
    main_title = glue("{pretty}: Hypo only (direction-aware)")
  )

  dev.off()
  msg("✓ Wrote Venn PDF: ", pdf_file)
}

msg("Done. Venn-only PDFs are in: ", normalizePath(venn_dir))
```
